race.comment: COUSINS DAY (10) did little and finished 8 lengths from the winner in seventh over 2000m at Warrnambool last start but will find this easier and will appreciate firmer footing that he's struck at his past few. TRIORA (11) missed the placings two runs back then didn't feature last start when 8 lengths away in sixth over 3000m at Sandown-Lakeside after being prominent at the bend. Now with Taige Weir, who's horses have to be respected in whatever races they contest. GRIPPING (2) was super at his first run for the stable and has the advantage of Pateman aboard. HOODYS HORSE (3) performed above expectations when resuming last time over 1500m at Ballarat, finishing a nose second at huge odds and draws to get a great run.
